hero.thesis: Launch a booking tool tailored for mobile pet groomers, leveraging SMS-based scheduling to fill a gap in the market.
hero.marketSize: Over 50,000 mobile pet grooming businesses in the U.S. alone, many without efficient booking solutions.
hero.payingEvidence: Increased demand for mobile services and existing scheduling tools priced at $30-$100/mo.

ninetyDay.title: Market Intelligence & Positioning

actions.action: Research 10 mobile grooming businesses and document their booking processes.
Join two online communities for mobile groomers (e.g., GroomerConnect, PetServicePro) to understand pain points.
Draft a positioning statement for your tool, focusing on SMS-based efficiency.

ninetyDay.metric: Positioning clarity with 3 validated pain points.

ninetyDay.title: MVP Development

actions.action: Map out core features using Notion: SMS scheduling, client reminders, payment collection.
Set up a Webflow landing page to capture interest and collect emails.
Configure a basic SMS scheduling prototype using Twilio.

ninetyDay.metric: Functional MVP with landing page and SMS scheduling.

ninetyDay.title: Pre-launch Feedback

actions.action: Reach out to 10 groomers from week 1 with your MVP for feedback.
Iterate on MVP based on feedback, focus on usability improvements.
Refine pricing strategy based on competitor analysis and feedback.

ninetyDay.metric: Feedback from 5 groomers and MVP iteration.

actions.action: Launch an early adopter campaign offering a 30-day free trial.
Promote campaign in GroomerConnect and PetServicePro communities.
Set up a ConvertKit sequence for leads from your landing page.
Follow up with trial users via SMS to collect feedback and encourage conversion.
Optimize onboarding process to reduce drop-off.
Run a small paid ad campaign targeting mobile groomers on Facebook.
Expand outreach to local pet business directories for partnerships.
Create content (blog post or video) about the benefits of SMS scheduling for groomers.
Engage with potential customers in Reddit's r/petgrooming.

ninetyDay.title: Refine Product & Marketing

actions.action: Conduct user interviews with paying customers to refine features.
Implement two feature requests from feedback.
Analyze ad campaign performance and optimize for better ROI.

ninetyDay.metric: 30% ad ROI increase and 2 new features.

actions.action: Automate scheduling notifications using n8n.
Set up Zapier integrations for payment processing with Stripe.
Streamline customer support with canned responses in Lovable.
Research expansion into related verticals (e.g., mobile car detailing).
Design targeted landing pages for each new vertical.
Initiate outreach to new verticals' online communities.
Survey customers about their experience and satisfaction.
Implement one major improvement based on survey feedback.
Conduct a performance review of all automation and integrations.
Collaborate with an influencer in the pet grooming niche for a review.
Create a referral program to incentivize current users.
Optimize SEO on main and vertical landing pages.

ninetyDay.title: Consolidate & Plan for Growth

actions.action: Review financials and MRR growth to date.
Plan next quarter's roadmap focusing on feature expansions.
Host a webinar for current users to discuss upcoming features and collect feedback.

ninetyDay.metric: Clear roadmap and user engagement in webinar.

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize feature maps and user research efficiently.

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Quickly build and iterate on landing pages without code.

toolStack.name: Twilio
toolStack.why: Enable SMS scheduling and notifications for users.

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Manage email sequences for lead nurturing and user engagement.

toolStack.name: n8n
toolStack.why: Automate workflows and reduce manual tasks for scheduling notifications.
toolStack.pricing: Free for self-hosted, cloud starts at $20/month

firstTenCustomers.script: Hi [Name], I've developed a new booking tool specifically for mobile groomers like you. It simplifies scheduling using SMS, making it easier for your clients to book and for you to manage appointments. Would you be interested in trying it out with a free 30-day trial? Let me know!
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Contact each lead twice a week until a response is received or for three weeks.

pricing.raisingRules: Evaluate pricing every 6 months based on new feature releases and market demand.

failureModes: Ignoring customer feedback: leads to churn.
Overcomplicating the MVP: delays launch and confuses users.
Neglecting community engagement: cuts off a vital marketing channel.
Underpricing: undervalues your tool and limits perceived quality.
Lack of integrations: frustrates users who rely on multiple tools.
Ignoring competitor moves: leaves you vulnerable to being outmaneuvered.

setup.llc: Use Stripe Atlas to set up your LLC for $500.
setup.contracts: Draft simple terms of service using LegalZoom's templates.
setup.insurance: Consider a basic business insurance policy from Hiscox for liability coverage.

scaling: Once you hit consistent MRR and customer feedback suggests it's time to grow, consider hiring a part-time developer to focus on feature enhancements and a customer success manager to maintain high satisfaction levels. Use tools like Lovable to streamline support and ensure fast response times. As your user base expands, invest in a dedicated sales lead to explore partnerships and new verticals. Scale your marketing efforts via SEO optimization and influencer collaborations to maintain customer acquisition momentum. Establish quarterly review meetings to assess progress, realign goals, and pivot strategies as necessary.
